version_description: Based off the album version, Slash chords included, Chords synced with the Lyrics or underscores(beats) (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wg92RrNhB8s).

versions.version_description: My first time to make one

This arrangement was made with a more jazz way. It is not that difficult to play the chords, but you need to know at least the basics of how to play. In addition, it is necessary to use a capo on the first fret.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Ariana Grande - One Last Time
(https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wg92RrNhB8s)

Tuning:  Standard
Capo:    1st fret
Arranged key: Em
Original key: Fm

Slash chords included
Chords synced with the Lyrics or underscores(beats)


[Intro]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
_    _    _    _      _    _    _    _[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
_    _    _    _      _    _    _    _[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I was a liar, I gave in to the fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I know I should've fought it, at least I'am being honest[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Feel like a failure, cause I know that I failed you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I should've done you better, cause you don't want a liar[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know she gives you everything but boy, I couldn't[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
give it   to       you[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know that you got everything but I got nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
here    without    you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
So one    last   time I need to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
be the one who takes you home[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
One   more    time I promise[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
af-ter  that, I'll let you go[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I don't care if you got her in your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
All I really care is you wake up in my arms[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
One   last   time I need to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
be the one who takes you home[/tab]


[Verse 2]


[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I don't deserve it, I know I don't deserve it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
But stay with me a   minute, I   swear I'll make it worth it[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Can't you forgive me? At least just temporarily[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I know that this is  my fault, I   should have been more careful[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know she gives you everything but boy, I couldn't[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
give it   to       you[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know that you got everything but I got nothing[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
